name: @trustchain/trustchain
description: Decentralized trust layer for autonomous AI agents — bilateral signed interaction records with Sybil-resistant trust scores

sidecarBinary.description: Path to the trustchain-node binary. Auto-discovered if not set.

portBase.description: Base port for the sidecar (4 consecutive ports used). Auto-allocated if not set.

bootstrap.description: Bootstrap peer addresses (host:port) for initial network connectivity.

autoStart.description: Start the TrustChain sidecar automatically when the plugin loads.

autoRecord.description: Automatically record interactions on command completion.
